assertion_results.text: A SKILL.md file exists in the output skill directory
The SKILL.md has valid YAML frontmatter with name and description fields
assertion_results.evidence: Frontmatter contains name: nextjs-cdk-deploy and description: 'Deploys Next.js applications to AWS using CDK with staged rollouts...'

assertion_results.text: The description includes 'Use when' trigger conditions mentioning Next.js and deployment
assertion_results.evidence: Description contains: 'Use when deploying a Next.js app to AWS, setting up CDK infrastructure for Next.js, creating a staging-to-production deployment pipeline, rolling back a failed AWS deployment, or managing environment-specific CDK stacks.' Mentions both Next.js and deployment.

assertion_results.text: The SKILL.md body contains a multi-step numbered deployment workflow
assertion_results.evidence: 8-step numbered workflow: '### 1. Pre-flight checks', '### 2. Configure environment', '### 3. Build the Next.js application', '### 4. Synthesize the CDK stack', '### 5. Deploy to staging', '### 6. Manual approval gate', '### 7. Deploy to production', '### 8. Post-deployment verification'

assertion_results.text: The SKILL.md body mentions staging and production environments
assertion_results.evidence: Extensive coverage: Step 5 'Deploy to staging', Step 7 'Deploy to production', config examples for staging.ts and production.ts, staging URL verification, manual approval gate between staging and production.

assertion_results.text: The SKILL.md body includes rollback procedures with specific steps
assertion_results.evidence: Section '## Rollback Procedures' (lines 221-283) with three subsections: 'Quick rollback (CloudFormation)' with aws cloudformation rollback-stack commands, 'CloudFront rollback (cache-level)' with invalidation commands, 'Full redeploy rollback' with 4 numbered steps, and a 'Rollback decision tree' table.

assertion_results.text: A scripts/ directory exists with at least 2 deployment-related scripts
assertion_results.evidence: scripts/ directory contains 3 .ts files: deploy.ts (283 lines), rollback.ts (321 lines), check-health.ts (219 lines)

assertion_results.text: The scripts use Bun TypeScript (.ts files) as the preferred runtime
assertion_results.evidence: All 3 scripts are .ts files with #!/usr/bin/env bun shebang and use import { $ } from 'bun': deploy.ts, rollback.ts, check-health.ts

assertion_results.text: An evals/evals.json file exists with at least 2 test cases
assertion_results.evidence: No evals/evals.json file found. Glob search for **/evals.json in the with_skill output directory returned no results. No evals/ directory exists.

assertion_results.text: The SKILL.md body includes a Common mistakes or pitfalls section
assertion_results.evidence: Line 284: '## Common mistakes' section with a table of 8 mistake/fix pairs covering deploying without staging, forgetting cdk bootstrap, hardcoding env values, etc.

assertion_results.text: The SKILL.md body is under 500 lines
assertion_results.evidence: SKILL.md is 347 lines, under the 500 line limit.
